race.comment: TILL DUSK (1) hasn't done much wrong with a win and four placings from five career outings to date and it's hard to knock mares in form. Ready to peak now fourth run back and gets some weight relief with the 1.5kg claim. Can continue the rich vein of form. KURITHEA (6) has placed two from two around this circuit and rarely puts in a poor one. Has to be included. FIFTY CALIBRE (2) is one from one at this track and must be respected out of the Bruce yard. In the mix. LADY TANGALOOMA (12) was a touch flat in town last time but go on the solid maiden win over this trip two back. Can bounce back.
